channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: San Jose State's volleyball season that ignited debate over gender in sports ends in MW title match
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — San Jose State's volleyball team, the subject of a national debate about participation in women's sports, was beaten by Colorado State 27-25, 25-20, 23-25, 25-16 in Saturday's Mountain West tournament final, ending the Spartans' season.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: High school football in pictures: Our staff’s best photos of Week 14, 2024
item.description: Games featured include Campolindo-Acalanes, Pittsburg-San Ramon, Bishop O'Dowd-Amador Valley, Los Gatos-St.
item.dc:creator: Karl Mondon, Doug Duran, Jose Carlos Fajardo, Shae Hammond, Nhat V. Meyer, The Mercury News

item.title: Penn State snatches Big Ten title game berth from Ohio State for first appearance since 2016
item.description: Penn State was given an opportunity after Ohio State's loss Saturday, and the Nittany Lions took advantage to clinch a spot in the Big Ten title game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gus Malzahn is leaving UCF to become Florida State's offensive coordinator, AP source says
item.description: Gus Malzahn is resigning as Central Florida's head coach to become Florida State 's offensive coordinator, a person familiar with the hire told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan fans mock VP-elect Vance after alma mater Ohio State's upset loss to Michigan
item.description: Vice President-elect JD Vance posted on X, saying Ohio State played like "champions," adding he's "proud of them" after their loss to Michigan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iowa trolls Nebraska after some Cornhuskers players decline pregame handshake
item.description: The Iowa Hawkeyes football players appeared to get the last laugh after a heated pregame exchange in the annual rivalry game against Nebraska.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Josh Allen's ex-girlfriend claims account was hacked after comment mocking CTE
item.description: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen's ex-girlfriend deleted a comment and a post from her account after news of Allen's engagement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Norris defies orders to help Piastri and Verstappen loses the Qatar pole to Russell
item.description: Lando Norris ignored team orders as he handed his McLaren teammate Oscar Piastri the win the sprint race at the Qatar Grand Prix in a one-two finish for the team.
item.dc:creator: James Ellingworth, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: USU wins NIT season tip-off over North Texas, 61-57
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - A career-best scoring performance from Mason Falslev helped lead Utah State men’s basketball (7-0, 0-0 MW) to a championship game title at the NIT Season Tip-Off Friday evening, as the Aggies defeated North Texas 61-57 at the ESPN Wide World of Sports Complex.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado coach Deion Sanders says Shedeur Sanders, Travis Hunter, other stars 'going to play' in bowl game
item.description: The Colorado football team does not plan on falling in line with the trend of key players sitting out a bowl game, even if that game is not part of the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Tennessee head coach Bill Battle dies at 82
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (WATE) -- Former University of Tennessee Coach William "Bill" Battle III died on Thanksgiving morning at the age of 82, according to the university.
item.dc:creator: Hope McAlee, NewsNation

item.title: Colorado State advances to MW volleyball final and will take the court against San Jose State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Colorado State coach Emily Kohan said her team will take the floor rather than become the latest team to forfeit against San Jose State after the top-seeded Rams advanced to the Mountain West volleyball tournament final on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Women's volleyball player, accused of conspiring with SJSU transgender athlete, kneels during national anthem
item.description: A Colorado State women's volleyball player who allegedly conspired with trans athlete Blaire Fleming to influence a match, was one of three players to kneel during the national anthem.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alabama A&M football player's death confirmed days after school’s erroneous statement
item.description: Alabama A&M linebacker Medrick Burnett Jr. died Wednesday after succumbing to injuries he sustained during a football game on Oct. 26. He was just 20 years old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alabama A&M player Medrick Burnett Jr. dies following injury during game
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (WIAT) — Medrick Burnett Jr., a 20-year-old football player for Alabama A&M University, died Wednesday a month after sustaining a serious injury during a football game. Burnett Jr., a linebacker who was injured during the Magic City Classic on Oct.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, WGN 9

item.title: Taylor Swift spends Black Friday amid sea of red as boyfriend Travis Kelce's Chiefs face the Raiders
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Pop superstar Taylor Swift was spending Black Friday amid a sea of red to watch her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the rest of the Kansas City Chiefs as they played the Las Vegas Raiders in a chilly matinee at Arrowhead Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago Bears fire head coach Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears have fired head coach Matt Eberflus following a six-game losing streak, with offensive coordinator Thomas Brown serving as interim coach.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: NFL football on Thanksgiving
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Dallas Cowboys ended a six-game home losing streak with a 27-20 victory over the New York Giants on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Oakland youth football team raises funds for national championship trip
item.description: (KRON) -- One of the Bay Area's top youth football programs has qualified for the 2024 Pop Warner Championship. However, the East Bay Warriors 13U team will need the community's support to help get them there.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: 49ers to likely play Bills in heavy snow, 'dangerously cold wind chills': NWS
item.description: (KRON) -- In last week's 38-10 blowout loss to the Green Bay Packers, the 49ers' loss had little to do with the weather at Lambeau Field, also known as "The Frozen Tundra." At kickoff, it was a calm 42 degrees and mostly cloudy in the typical chilly Midwest city.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Depleted Jazz lose to Denver, 122-103
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Without injured stars Lauri Markkanen, John Collins and Jordan Clarkson, the Utah Jazz had little chance against the Denver Nuggets and lost for the sixth time in their last seven games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New York Jets hire 33rd team to assist in hiring process
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- An organizational shift is upon us for the New York Jets. Owner Woody Johnson has hired the 33rd team which was founded by former Jets GM Mike Tannenbaum in 2019, to help aid the Jets search.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Orlando takes on Chicago, aims for 4th straight win
item.description: Chicago Bulls (8-11, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Orlando Magic (12-7, third in the Eastern Conference) Orlando, Florida; Wednesday, 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Los Angeles area grad on life support after suffering head injury in college football game
item.description: A graduate of a Los Angeles County high school is on life support after suffering a serious head injury during a college football game last month. His school had mistakenly announced he had died Tuesday. According to KTLA affiliate WHNT in Huntsville, Alabama, 20-year-old Medrick Burnett Jr.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: CU Buffs basketball upsets defending champion UConn at Maui Invitational
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — What a huge win for Tadd Boyle and the Colorado Buffaloes. A 14.5-point underdog against the two-time defending national champion #2 UConn Huskies at the Maui Invitational, CU erased an early 11-point deficit before going blow for blow in the second half.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Wembanyama scores 34 as Spurs beat Jazz, 128-115
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - 17 games into the NBA season, the Utah Jazz and San Antonio Spurs have already played each other four times, and the Jazz have to be glad they don't have to see Victor Wembanyama again this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds ruling to allow SJSU women's volleyball team member to play
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender. The 10th U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: SEC fines University of Oklahoma $200,000 after fans rush onto field
item.description: The University of Oklahoma was fined $200,000 after the fans rushed the field during Saturday's game against Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Dylan Brown / KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Rams WR Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI after loss to Eagles
item.description: Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: As offense ascends, Bears defense goes on sneaky decline under Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears' defense has been struggling to stop opposing offenses, resulting in a five-game losing streak, while the offense has been unable to score enough points to win games.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family has boiled over.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: Montrose football dominates, off to State Final Four
item.description: The Montrose Red Hawks delivered a commanding performance in the third round of the Class 4A playoffs, defeating Mesa Ridge 53-21 on Friday night to secure their spot in the semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: No. 5 UCLA women stun No. 1 South Carolina 77-62, snap Gamecocks' 43-game win streak
item.description: Londynn Jones scored 15 points, making all five of her 3-pointers, and fifth-ranked UCLA stunned No. 1 South Carolina 77-62 on Sunday, ending the Gamecocks’ overall 43-game winning streak and their run of 33 consecutive road victories.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Williams unable to carry Bears to victory, Chicago loses in OT to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Caleb Williams put on the Superman cape at the end of the fourth quarter, but the Chicago Bears still couldn't get out of their own way in an overtime loss to the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday at Soldier Field. Here's a breakdown of how the game transpired.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Asked how he planned to celebrate his fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship, Max Verstappen did a quick scan of the room searching for a drop of alcohol. “Well, I ran out of beer, so I don't know,” he said. “Maybe another one, and then maybe I switch to something else.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes out of bowl game contention after 31-28 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down to their fifth-string quarterback, the Utes football team almost pulled out a spectacular comeback against #22 Iowa State, only to lose its seventh straight game, 31-28.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
